title: centella ternata
intro: Centella ternata, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant that belongs to the water spinach family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella ternata include improving cognitive function, boosting the immune system, and promoting skin health, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. Centella ternata can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its benefits.
